# 数据结构与算法面试题

> 模拟真实面试场景，训练对数据结构和算法的思考与表达。

---


## 一、基础题

<InterviewCard id="data-structures-algorithms-interview-q1" title="1. 什么是时间复杂度和空间复杂度？" difficulty="🟢" questionBase64="" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="data-structures-algorithms-interview-q2" title="2. 数组和链表的区别是什么？" difficulty="🟢" questionBase64="" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="data-structures-algorithms-interview-q3" title="3. 什么是哈希表？前端有哪些应用？" difficulty="🟢" questionBase64="" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="data-structures-algorithms-interview-q4" title="4. 栈（Stack）与队列（Queue）的原理及区别" difficulty="🟢" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popjmj4/ov7A8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7fpmJDov7DmoIjlkozpmJ/liJfnmoTmoLjlv4PnibnmgKfjgIHlkIToh6rnmoTlrp7njrDmlrnlvI/vvIzlubbor7TmmI7lroPku6zlnKjliY3nq6/lvIDlj5HkuK3nmoTlhbjlnovlupTnlKjlnLrmma/jgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="data-structures-algorithms-interview-q5" title="5. 反转链表" difficulty="🟢" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popjmj4/ov7A8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJrnu5nlrprkuIDkuKrljZXlkJHpk77ooajnmoTlpLToioLngrnvvIzlsIblhbblj43ovazvvIzov5Tlm57lj43ovazlkI7nmoTmlrDlpLToioLngrnjgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

## 二、进阶题

<InterviewCard id="data-structures-algorithms-interview-q6" title="6. 如何用栈实现队列？" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popjmj4/ov7A8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJrkvb/nlKjkuKTkuKrmoIjlrp7njrDkuIDkuKrpmJ/liJfvvIzmlK/mjIEgcHVzaO+8iOWFpemYn++8ieOAgXBvcO+8iOWHuumYn++8ieOAgXBlZWvvvIjmn6XnnIvpmJ/pppbvvInlkowgZW1wdHnvvIjliKTnqbrvvInmk43kvZzjgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="data-structures-algorithms-interview-q7" title="7. 解释二叉树的前序、中序、后序遍历，并说明应用场景。" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popjmj4/ov7A8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7for7TmmI7kuozlj4nmoJHkuInnp43mt7HluqbkvJjlhYjpgY3ljobnmoTop4TliJnjgIHku6PnoIHlrp7njrDlkozlrp7pmYXlupTnlKjlnLrmma/jgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="data-structures-algorithms-interview-q8" title="8. LRU 缓存机制" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="data-structures-algorithms-interview-q9" title="9. 二叉树的最近公共祖先（LCA）" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popjmj4/ov7A8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJrnu5nlrprkuIDmo7Xkuozlj4nmoJHlkozkuKTkuKroioLngrkgcOOAgXHvvIzmib7liLDlroPku6zmnIDov5HnmoTlhazlhbHnpZblhYjoioLngrnjgILmnIDov5HlhazlhbHnpZblhYjmjIfkuKTkuKroioLngrnlnKjmoJHkuK3mnIDkvY7nmoTvvIjljbPmnIDmt7HnmoTvvInlhbHlkIznpZblhYjoioLngrnjgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="data-structures-algorithms-interview-q10" title="10. 堆（Heap）与 Top K 问题" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popjmj4/ov7A8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJrnu5nlrprkuIDkuKrmnKrmjpLluo/nmoTmlbTmlbDmlbDnu4TvvIzmib7lh7rlhbbkuK3mnIDlpKfnmoQgSyDkuKrmlbDvvIjmiJbmnIDlsI/nmoQgSyDkuKrmlbDvvInjgILopoHmsYLliIbmnpDkuI3lkIzop6Pms5XnmoTml7bpl7TlpI3mnYLluqbjgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="data-structures-algorithms-interview-q11" title="11. 滑动窗口最大值" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popjmj4/ov7A8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJrnu5nlrprkuIDkuKrmlbDnu4QgbnVtcyDlkozmu5Hliqjnqpflj6PlpKflsI8ga++8jOivt+aJvuWHuuaJgOaciea7keWKqOeql+WPo+mHjOeahOacgOWkp+WAvOOAguS+i+Wmgui+k+WFpSBbMSwzLC0xLC0zLDUsMyw2LDddIOWSjCBrPTPvvIzovpPlh7ogWzMsMyw1LDUsNiw3XeOAgjwvcD4K" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="data-structures-algorithms-interview-q12" title="12. 两数之和及其变体" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popjmj4/ov7A8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJrnu5nlrprkuIDkuKrmlbTmlbDmlbDnu4QgbnVtcyDlkozkuIDkuKrnm67moIflgLwgdGFyZ2V077yM6K+35Zyo5pWw57uE5Lit5om+5Ye65ZKM5Li655uu5qCH5YC855qE5Lik5Liq5pWw77yM6L+U5Zue5a6D5Lus55qE5LiL5qCH44CC5YGH6K6+5q+P56eN6L6T5YWl5Y+q5pyJ5LiA56eN562U5qGI44CCPC9wPgo=" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="data-structures-algorithms-interview-q13" title="13. 排序算法对比与前端应用" difficulty="🟡" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popjmj4/ov7A8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJror7flr7nmr5TluLjop4HmjpLluo/nrpfms5XnmoTml7bpl7TlpI3mnYLluqbjgIHnqbrpl7TlpI3mnYLluqblkoznqLPlrprmgKfvvIzlubbor7TmmI7liY3nq6/lvIDlj5HkuK3nmoTmjpLluo/lupTnlKjlnLrmma/jgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

## 三、高级题

<InterviewCard id="data-structures-algorithms-interview-q14" title="14. 设计一个虚拟列表，支持 10 万条数据的高效渲染。" difficulty="🔴" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popjmj4/ov7A8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJrlvZPpnIDopoHmuLLmn5PlpKfph4/mlbDmja7vvIjlpoIgMTAg5LiH5p2h77yJ5pe277yM55u05o6l5riy5p+T5omA5pyJIERPTSDoioLngrnkvJrlr7zoh7TkuKXph43nmoTmgKfog73pl67popjjgILor7forr7orqHkuIDkuKromZrmi5/liJfooajnu4Tku7bmnaXpq5jmlYjmuLLmn5PlpKfph4/mlbDmja7jgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="data-structures-algorithms-interview-q15" title="15. 如何检测有向图中的环？" difficulty="🔴" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popjmj4/ov7A8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJrnu5nlrprkuIDkuKrmnInlkJHlm77vvIzmo4DmtYvlhbbkuK3mmK/lkKblrZjlnKjnjq/jgILor7for7TmmI7oh7PlsJHkuKTnp43op6Pms5Xlj4rlhbblupTnlKjlnLrmma/jgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="data-structures-algorithms-interview-q16" title="16. 基于 Trie 的前端路由匹配" difficulty="🔴" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popjmj4/ov7A8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJrorr7orqHkuIDkuKrot6/nlLHns7vnu5/vvIzmlK/mjIHms6jlhozot6/lvoTmqKHlvI/vvIjlpoIgL3VzZXIvOmlk44CBL3VzZXIvOmlkL3Byb2ZpbGXvvInlubbmoLnmja7or7fmsYLot6/lvoTljLnphY3lr7nlupTnmoTlpITnkIblh73mlbDjgILor7fkvb/nlKggVHJpZe+8iOWJjee8gOagke+8ieWunueOsOOAgjwvcD4K" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="data-structures-algorithms-interview-q17" title="17. 股票买卖问题（动态规划）" difficulty="🔴" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popjmj4/ov7A8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJrnu5nlrprkuIDkuKrmlbDnu4QgcHJpY2Vz77yM5YW25LitIHByaWNlc1tpXSDmmK/nrKwgaSDlpKnnmoTogqHnpajku7fmoLzjgILmnIDlpJrlhYHorrjlrozmiJDkuIDnrJTkuqTmmJPvvIjkubDlhaXkuIDmrKEgKyDljZblh7rkuIDmrKHvvInvvIzmsYLog73ojrflvpfnmoTmnIDlpKfliKnmtqbjgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="data-structures-algorithms-interview-q18" title="18. 岛屿数量（DFS / BFS）" difficulty="🔴" questionBase64="" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="data-structures-algorithms-interview-q19" title="19. 序列化与反序列化二叉树" difficulty="🔴" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popjmj4/ov7A8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJrorr7orqHkuIDkuKrnrpfms5XlsIbkuozlj4nmoJHluo/liJfljJbkuLrlrZfnrKbkuLLvvIzlubbog73ku47or6XlrZfnrKbkuLLlj43luo/liJfljJblm57ljp/lp4vnmoTkuozlj4nmoJHjgILluo/liJfljJbnu5PmnpzlupTmlK/mjIHoh6rlrprkuYnliIbpmpTnrKblkoznqbroioLngrnmoIforrDjgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />

<InterviewCard id="data-structures-algorithms-interview-q20" title="20. 合并 K 个有序链表" difficulty="🔴" questionBase64="PHA+PHN0cm9uZz7pl67popjmj4/ov7A8L3N0cm9uZz7vvJrnu5nlrpogSyDkuKrmnInluo/pk77ooajnmoTlpLToioLngrnmlbDnu4TvvIzlsIbmiYDmnInpk77ooajlkIjlubbkuLrkuIDkuKrmnInluo/pk77ooajlubbov5Tlm57jgILor7fliIbmnpDkuI3lkIzop6Pms5XnmoTml7bpl7TlpI3mnYLluqbjgII8L3A+Cg==" answerBase64="" />
